allow: Bash(python -c "import sqlite3, os; db_path = r''C:\\Users\\daanm\\MedHub\\ipub.db''; print\(f''DB exists: {os.path.exists\(db_path\)}''\); conn = sqlite3.connect\(db_path\) if os.path.exists\(db_path\) else None; result = [\(r[0], conn.execute\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM ''+r[0]\).fetchone\(\)[0]\) for r in conn.execute\(""SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=''table''""\).fetchall\(\)] if conn else []; print\(''Tables and row counts:''\); [print\(f''  {name}: {count}''\) for name, count in result]; conn.close\(\) if conn else None")
